tool_input.description: Check current dir and playwright-cli folder
Run audit script from current dir

tool_input.command: node audit.js > audit-output.json 2> audit-err.log; echo EXIT=$?; tail -20 audit-err.log

tool_input.new_string:
// Age 60 more months to stress test + trigger bill reports & boss msgs
  for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) await advanceMonth();

tool_input.command: node audit.js > audit-output.json 2> audit-err.log; echo EXIT=$?; head -3 audit-err.log; echo '---'; wc -l audit-output.json

cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add 20-bank system with job-tailored insurance coverage

Each bank offers a bundled insurance package that reduces
costs on matching downsides (medical, auto, home, tech,
identity, legal, pet, fire). Banks charge a monthly fee,
pay a signup bonus, and add an APY bonus on high-yield
savings. Sector-matched banks surface first in the list
with a FIT star for the player's current job.

Bank update events (rate changes, loyalty bonuses, fraud
alerts, mergers, breaches) land in the inbox ~9%/month
while enrolled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Employees now send morale check-ins to the inbox

Each hire gets a random name and a starting morale. Morale
drifts monthly based on business profitability, tenure, and
random events. Every employee has a ~12% monthly chance of
sending the player an inbox message â€” the tone scales with
morale (positive, steady, slipping, or critical) and mentions
specific workplace problems drawn from a 15-item catalog.

Low morale dampens the revenue boost multiplier, so ignoring
staff messages has real cost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master
tool_input.description: Commit and push employee messages feature

tool_input.command:
cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Preserve scroll position when buying/selling stocks and crypto

Buy/sell handlers previously re-rendered the entire grid by
re-calling showStockModal / showCryptoModal, which reset the
scroll position to the top. Replaced with in-place card
updates that refresh only the affected owned/meta/buttons +
cash display.

Cap inbox in addInboxItem instead of only in generateInboxItems
to prevent one-item overshoot when multiple emitters fire the
same month (found via stress test).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master 2>&1 | tail -3
tool_input.description: Commit and push to main repo
